---
title: '2014/06/05 Thu Journal Phil the Man!'
date: '2014-06-10T11:14:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '617164773278694673'
blogger_filename: '/2014/06/20140605-thu-journal-phil-man.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<p>This morning I was led to pray for Phil, the man who thought he was a woman I met at CPK. Tongues no interpretation. I asked God to show Phil God's calling on his life.</p>
<p>Father, show Phil how YOU see him!</p>
<p>Got to work early.</p>
